coretap.name: CoreTAP
coretap.tenantNote: demo-bot owns tenant id 8 ('The Miami Beach Club'). Static seed: 200 orders, 8 staff, 30 days. Reviews/weather/YoY widgets blank. Revenue flat Mon-Sun.

overview.name: CoreTAP Overview — The Money You're Leaving on the Table
overview.description: 8-step first-look for any bar owner; adapted to 6 captured screens with per-screen popups.

navigationPlan.note: Pulse Live — real-time revenue / activity feed
Closing — back to dashboard for CTA

popup.title: Welcome to {{prospectName}}'s CoreTAP Dashboard
popup.body: This is the command center for {{prospectName}}. Everything you need to know about your bar's health is on this single screen — built specifically for owners and GMs who don't have time to dig through reports.

popup.title: Revenue Pulse — Live, Not Lagging
popup.body: This Revenue Pulse widget updates every 5 minutes from your POS. No more waiting for end-of-night reports — see {{prospectName}}'s revenue as it happens, with comparisons against last week and last month.

popup.title: Golden Hours — Where Your Money Actually Comes From
popup.body: Most bars make 60% of their nightly revenue in just 3 hours. Golden Hours pinpoints exactly when {{prospectName}}'s peak window is — so you can staff smarter, push happy hour tighter, and stop bleeding labor cost in the dead zones.

popup.title: Active Voids Alert — Theft Doesn't Hide Anymore
popup.body: Every void on every ticket, flagged in real time. CoreTAP groups suspicious patterns by employee and shows you the dollar amount at risk — not just the count. This alone has paid for the system at most of our bars within 30 days.

popup.title: Staff Performance Ring — Who's Carrying the Bar
popup.body: A-D grading on every employee, every shift. The ring shows you at a glance who your A-players are and where your D-players are dragging revenue down.

popup.title: See What CoreTAP Finds in {{prospectName}}
popup.body: We'd expect to find $2,000+/month in recoverable revenue at {{prospectName}} in the first 30 days — voids, missed peak staffing, and underperforming employees you couldn't see before. Book a 20-minute call and we'll walk through it together.

golden-hours.name: Golden Hours — Where 60% of Your Revenue Hides
golden-hours.description: Deep-dive on the 3-hour peak revenue window detection.

popup.title: What Are Golden Hours?
popup.body: Golden Hours is the 3-hour window where {{prospectName}} makes the majority of its nightly revenue. We detect it automatically by analyzing 30+ days of POS data — no setup, no manual configuration.

popup.title: The 3-Hour Revenue Window Heatmap
popup.body: This heatmap shows every hour of every night, color-coded by revenue density. The bright band is your Golden Hours — for bars like {{prospectName}}, that's typically Friday and Saturday between 9pm and midnight.

popup.title: Day-Over-Day Revenue Comparison
popup.body: Compare today's Golden Hours performance against last week, last month, and the same weeknight pattern. If Saturday at 10pm is down 18%, you'll see it immediately — not three days later in a paper report.

popup.title: 60% of Revenue in 3 Hours
popup.body: If {{prospectName}} makes $1,000/night, $600 of it is happening in a 3-hour window. Get those 3 hours right and revenue compounds. Get them wrong and the whole night is a loss.

popup.title: Ready to See {{prospectName}}'s Golden Hours?
popup.body: Monitor tier ($449/mo) gets you the live Golden Hours view. Execute tier ($599/mo) adds staff recommendations, drink-push guidance, and prep timing. Want a walkthrough?

void-detection.name: Void Detection — The Theft You're Not Seeing
void-detection.description: For the skeptical owner who insists their staff doesn't steal.

popup.title: Most Bars Lose 2–4% of Revenue to Voids
popup.body: You probably don't think theft is happening at {{prospectName}}. Neither did 90% of the owners we work with — until CoreTAP showed them the patterns. The average find in month one is $1,200 in suspicious voids.

popup.title: The Void Alerts Dashboard
popup.body: Every void at {{prospectName}} in real time, grouped by employee, ticket, time of day, and dollar amount. Not a report you have to ask for — a feed that surfaces the suspicious ones automatically.

popup.title: Filter by Employee — Who's at the Center of the Pattern
popup.body: One click filters the entire void history by a single employee. You'll see their void rate vs the team average, the times they happen, and the tickets involved. No accusations — just data.

popup.title: Suspicious Pattern Detected
popup.body: CoreTAP doesn't just show voids — it interprets them. When a bartender voids 6 drinks at the end of every Friday shift, we label the pattern so you know what you're looking at: pour-and-pocket, comp-and-keep, or legit.

popup.title: Dollar Amount at Risk — Make It Concrete
popup.body: This isn't 'maybe a few drinks.' CoreTAP calculates the exact dollar amount of suspicious voids over the last 30 days. For this employee at {{prospectName}}, that's $847 in pattern-flagged voids — a real number you can act on.

popup.title: Catch the First Pattern at {{prospectName}}
popup.body: CoreTAP sends a quiet, manager-only notification the moment a pattern crosses the threshold. No public alerts, no shaming — just the right person knowing the right thing at the right time. Want this running on {{prospectName}} this week?

employee-grading.name: Staff Performance — Your A-Players vs Your D-Players
employee-grading.description: A-D grading system for GM/manager-level demos.

popup.title: Every Employee, Graded A Through D
popup.body: CoreTAP grades every bartender, server, and barback A through D based on revenue per hour, voids, comps, ticket size, and shift quality. No more gut-feel performance reviews — actual data, every shift.

popup.title: The Grading Grid — At-a-Glance Hierarchy
popup.body: Every employee at {{prospectName}} in a single grid, sorted by grade. A-players in green at the top, D-players in red at the bottom. You'll know in 5 seconds who to invest in and who to coach out.

popup.title: Top Performer Highlight
popup.body: Click into your top A-player and see exactly what they do differently — bigger tickets, faster turn time, better upsell rate. Then use that as a coaching template for the rest of the team.

popup.title: Underperformer Flag — Coaching, Not Firing
popup.body: D-grades aren't a death sentence. CoreTAP flags the specific behaviors dragging an employee down — slow turn, low upsell, high void rate — so you can coach the fix instead of guessing what's wrong.

popup.title: Your A-Players Make 3x More Than Your D-Players
popup.body: Across the bars CoreTAP runs in, A-grade employees generate 3x the revenue per hour of D-grade employees. That gap is the single biggest unrecognized lever in {{prospectName}} right now. Want the grading running on your team this week?

cta.text: Grade My Team Free for 14 Days

monitor-pitch.name: Monitor Tier — Stop Bleeding Money You Can't See
monitor-pitch.description: Urgency-framed cold-outreach pitch. Ends in Calendly.

popup.title: {{prospectName}} Is Probably Losing $2,400/mo Right Now
popup.body: We pulled industry data for bars in {{prospectName}}'s revenue range. The average loss to undetected voids, missed peak windows, and underperforming shifts is $2,400/month. You won't see it in your P&L — that's the problem.

popup.title: This Is What CoreTAP Sees That You Don't
popup.body: Live Revenue Pulse, Active Void Alerts, Golden Hours peak windows, Staff Performance grading — all on one screen for {{prospectName}}, updated every 5 minutes from your POS. No reports to run. No spreadsheets to build.

popup.title: Monitor Tier — $449/mo. Pays for Itself in Week 2.
popup.body: $449/month gets you the full Monitor tier on {{prospectName}}: live dashboard, Golden Hours, void alerts, and staff grading. Average customer recovers the subscription cost in their first 14 days. Most recover it in the first week.

popup.title: Every Day You Wait, You Lose $80
popup.body: If the average bar loses $2,400/month, that's $80/day. Every day you put off booking a demo, you're choosing to let $80 walk out the door at {{prospectName}}. We're not selling software — we're selling the dollars you're already losing.

popup.title: Book a 20-Minute Demo. See {{prospectName}}'s Number.
popup.body: 20 minutes on Calendly. We'll pull a sample of {{prospectName}}'s public data and show you the specific dollar amount we'd expect to recover in month one. If the number isn't worth your time, we don't ask for a second meeting.

command-full.name: Command Tier — Multi-Location Operating System
command-full.description: Comprehensive Command-tier demo for multi-location operators and hospitality groups.

popup.title: Welcome to the {{prospectName}} Command Center
popup.body: This is the Command-tier view of {{prospectName}} — every location, every revenue line, every alert in a single operating screen. Built for groups running 3+ venues who can't be at every bar every night.

popup.title: Multi-Location Switcher — All Your Bars, One Click Away
popup.body: Toggle between any of {{prospectName}}'s venues instantly. Each bar keeps its own dashboard, its own staff, its own alerts — but you see them all from the same login.

popup.title: Cross-Venue Comparison Dashboard
popup.body: Side-by-side performance across every {{prospectName}} location. Revenue per labor hour, void rate, A-player ratio, Golden Hours capture rate — ranked. You'll see immediately which venue is the model and which one needs a manager change.

popup.title: Executive Summary — Your Monday Morning Brief
popup.body: Every Monday at 7am, {{prospectName}} gets a one-page executive summary across all venues — revenue, alerts, top wins, top problems, and the three actions that will move the needle this week.

popup.title: API Access — Plug Into Everything You Already Run
popup.body: Full REST and webhook API on Command tier. Pipe CoreTAP metrics into Looker, Sigma, Notion, your own data warehouse, or your CFO's dashboard. We don't fight your stack — we feed it.

popup.title: White-Label Option — Your Brand on Our Engine
popup.body: For groups, franchises, and management companies: re-skin the entire CoreTAP UI with {{prospectName}}'s brand. Your logo, your colors, your domain. CoreTAP becomes invisible — your operating platform becomes the product.

popup.title: Custom Alerts — Your Rules, Your Thresholds
popup.body: Command tier lets you define custom alerts across every venue. "Notify me if any {{prospectName}} location drops below 80% of forecasted revenue by 10pm." Your operating playbook, automated.

popup.title: Priority Support — A Human Within 4 Hours
popup.body: Command tier comes with priority support: dedicated Slack channel, 4-hour SLA, and a named CSM who knows {{prospectName}} by name. When your POS hiccups on a Saturday at 11pm, we're already on it.

popup.title: ROI Calculator — Your Payback Period in Real Numbers
popup.body: Plug in {{prospectName}}'s number of venues and average monthly revenue. The calculator shows your projected month-one recovery, your annualized ROI, and your payback period.

popup.title: Book Your Enterprise Call
popup.body: {{prospectName}} benchmarked against the {{prospectLocation}} market: where you lead, where you trail, and the three plays that close the gap fastest. Book 45 minutes and we'll walk you through your specific report and the Command-tier rollout plan.

atlastap.name: AtlasTAP
atlastap.note: Pending bot account provisioning. Do not implement auth or capture until CoreTAP end-to-end is green.
